productDisplayName: Doodle Boy's Little Monsters Rocking Rust Kidswear
description: CompositionRust crew neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, black piping round the neck and has a chest print FittingRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycleDo not bleachTumble dry low or lay flat to dryWarm iron when neededDo not iron on printIntroduce your little boy to the joy of music with this t-shirt from doodle. Encourage him to take up the guitar or the drums and form his own band and watch him rock the stage in this cotton tee that will keep him cool and comfortable all day. Team it with cargoes and little sneakers for a great rock star look.
